---
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

# Contact Us

Thank you for your interest in the **First National Conference on Bioactive Molecules: From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications (NCBM 2026)**.

The Organizing Committee is pleased to assist you with any questions related to the conference. Whether you need information about abstract submission, registration, the scientific program, accommodation, or participation, we are here to help.

---

## Conference Secretariat

**NCBM 2026 – Organizing Committee**

**Conception and Application of Bioactive Molecules (CAMBio) Laboratory**

**Higher National School of Biotechnology (ENSB) – Taoufik Khaznadar**

Ali Mendjeli University Campus

Constantine, Algeria

---

## Contact Information

📧 **Email:** ncbm@ensbiotech.edu.dz

☎ **Phone:** +213 5 50 84 74 87

🌐 **ENSB Website:** https://www.ensbiotech.edu.dz

---

## Follow CAMBio

Stay connected with CAMBio and receive the latest news, conference announcements, and updates.

- 📘 **Facebook:** [CAMBio Laboratory](https://www.facebook.com/share/1TyrSrw9hG/)
- 💼 **LinkedIn:** [CAMBio Laboratory](https://www.linkedin.com/company/labo-cambio/)
- ▶️ **YouTube:** [@LaboCAMBio](https://www.youtube.com/@LaboCAMBio)

---

## Office Hours

| Day | Hours |
|:------------------|:--------------|
| Sunday – Thursday | 08:30 – 16:30 |
| Friday – Saturday | Closed |

---

## How Can We Help?

Please contact the Conference Secretariat regarding:

- Abstract submission
- Registration and participation
- Conference fees
- Invitation letters
- Certificates of participation
- Accommodation
- Visa support for international participants
- Technical assistance
- General inquiries

We aim to respond to all email inquiries as quickly as possible.

---

::: {.callout-important}

## We're Here to Help

The Organizing Committee is committed to ensuring a smooth and enjoyable conference experience for all participants.

If you have any questions before or during the conference, please do not hesitate to contact us.

We look forward to welcoming you to **NCBM 2026** at the **Higher National School of Biotechnology (ENSB)** in **Constantine, Algeria**.

:::
